name: CCS Title Loan Services – LoanMart Mid City
description_short: LoanMart provides title loans in Los Angeles and nationwide, allowing borrowers to leverage vehicle equity for same-day emergency cash up to 50% of car value.
description_long:
LoanMart is a title loan servicer operating since 2002 with over 300,000 customers served. The company specializes in car title loans across multiple states including California, where they operate under California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI) licensing requirements. Their Los Angeles location serves consumers in the Mid City area seeking rapid access to emergency funds.

LoanMart offers several loan products centered around vehicle collateral: standard car title loans, online title loans, auto equity loans, title pawns, and title loan refinancing. Borrowers can access up to 50% of their vehicle's value, with funds delivered via direct deposit or in-person pickup at participating locations. The application process is streamlined—customers can apply online or by phone, submit documents by 2 PM PT for same-day funding, and receive cash within 24 hours in some cases. The company also provides a title loan calculator and serves customers with bad credit, no income documentation, or without bank accounts.

LoanMart distinguishes itself through operational speed (same-day funding claimed for timely submissions), multiple application channels (online, phone, in-person), flexible fund delivery methods, and geographic breadth across 13+ states. They provide financial education resources including how title loans work, requirements, FAQs, and budgeting tips. The company maintains a 2-star Google rating based on 294 reviews, indicating mixed customer satisfaction despite their claimed customer base.

Title loans are high-cost debt instruments requiring vehicle title as collateral, carrying significant financial risk. While California licensing and disclosure requirements exist, borrowers must carefully review interest rates and finance charges before signing. The 2-star rating suggests customer satisfaction concerns warrant careful consideration. This product is best suited only for genuine emergencies when other options are exhausted, given the collateral risk and cost structure typical of title lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available if documents submitted by 2 PM PT
Multiple application channels: online, phone, or in-person
Flexible fund delivery via direct deposit or location pickup
Can borrow up to 50% of vehicle value with paid-off or nearly paid-off car
Serves customers with bad credit, no income verification, and without bank accounts
Licensed by California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI)
Established company since 2002 with 300,000+ customers served
cons: Low Google rating (2 stars from 294 reviews) indicates significant customer satisfaction issues
Requires vehicle title as collateral with lien placement, risking vehicle loss on default
Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or finance charges upfront
Title loans are inherently high-cost emergency debt products with substantial repayment obligations
Limited transparency regarding actual approval odds despite 'prequalification' claim
best_for: Borrowers with immediate emergency cash needs and paid-off vehicles
Consumers unable to qualify for traditional personal loans due to poor credit
People needing fast access to funds who can comfortably repay within the loan term
diagnosis: LoanMart's title loans are appropriate only for borrowers with genuine financial emergencies who own paid-off vehicles and cannot access traditional credit. The primary caveat is the low 2-star customer rating despite claimed customer volume, combined with the inherent risks of collateral-based lending and typically high costs associated with title loans in California.
services: Loans for borrowers with bad credit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1890 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90006
